summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Cubic Logistics website. All backend APIs (7/7) and frontend features working perfectly. All form integrations (Quote, Contact, Career) successfully submitting to backend with email notifications.
passed_tests: Home page load with hero section, services, CTAs
About page navigation and all 5 sections
Services page navigation and 4 detailed sections
Contact page with form, Google Maps, contact info
Careers page with job listings and application form
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all pages and features working), Integration: 100% (all forms submitting successfully)
